chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Appeal No.952 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judges ______________________________________________________________ 1.For hg of MA No.17457/25 12.03.2026. Mr. Abdul Haleem Jamali, advocate for appellant. Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General. Learned counsel submits that appellant has been released after serving out the entire sentence and therefore under instructions he does not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
